10/01/2013
397 K0710B1_IV_TUBE_DAILY_PRIOR_CD K0710B1_IV_TUBE_DAILY_PRIOR_CD K0710B1 Average Fluid Intake per Day by IV or Tube Feeding While Not a Resident. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the average fluid intake per day by IV or tube feeding while not a resident of this faciltity within the last seven days. -= Not asessed/no information
 1=500 cc/day or less
 2=501 cc/day or more
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/1/2013
discontinued 9/30/2019
398 K0710B2_IV_TUBE_DAILY_PST_CD
